# Patriots' Pride Windows — Veteran-Owned Window, Door & Siding Installer (TN & GA)

> Patriots' Pride Windows is a veteran-owned, 4th-generation window, door and siding installation company headquartered in Chattanooga, Tennessee, with a second office in metro Atlanta, Georgia. The company serves the Southeast Tennessee tri-state market and the North Georgia / metro Atlanta corridor. Andersen Certified and James Hardie Alliance Select. Slogan: "No homeowner left behind."

## Company Information
- Name: Patriots' Pride Windows
- Legal name: JudRut Consulting Firm LLC (DBA Patriots' Pride Windows)
- Type: Home & Construction Business / Window, Door & Siding Installer
- Owners: Judson Simpson and Rutger Conradi (veteran-owned, owner-operated)
- Founded: 2021
- Location: 5036 Hwy 58 Ste 102, Chattanooga, TN 37416
- Second office: Metro Atlanta, Georgia
- Phone: (423) 654-4565
- Email: info@patriotspridewindows.com
- Website: https://www.patriotspridewindows.com
- License: TN #11022
- Insurance: $2,000,000 liability + workers' compensation
- Google rating: 4.9 stars (110 reviews)
- Projects completed: 15,000+
- Awards: Best of the Best 2024 & 2025 — Chattanooga Times Free Press
- Associations: BNI, NARI

## Differentiators
- True 4th-generation install company, NOT a sales/marketing organization.
- No 10-step sales pitch, no multi-hour in-home sales presentation; one honest, itemized price.
- Will install owner-supplied windows and doors (product bought elsewhere) to manufacturer spec — most competitors refuse.
- Manufacturer-direct on every brand. Signed timeline agreements between both parties.
- Owner-operators handle both front-end and backend so nothing falls through the cracks.

## Services Offered
### Window Replacement & New Construction Windows
- Styles: Double-Hung, Casement, Sliding, Bay/Bow, Picture, Awning
- Energy Star certified; Low-E, argon-filled insulated glass
- Brands: Andersen, MI, Polaris, Vinyl Max, Windsor, Sunrise, HGI
- Price range: $700–$2,200 per window; install 1–2 days; Lifetime material & labor warranty (transferable once, then prorated)

### Door Replacement (Entry, Patio, French, Storm)
- Full configuration catalog; fiberglass and steel
- Brands: ProVia, Andersen
- Price range: $3,973–$7,500; install 1–2 days; 15-year material & labor warranty
- Hometown Hero: 50% off exterior doors for active military, veterans, police, fire, EMS, dispatchers

### Siding Replacement (full replacement only)
- Materials: James Hardie fiber cement, Everlast composite, Royal & Mastic vinyl, stone veneer; includes trim, soffit, fascia
- Certification: James Hardie Alliance Select
- Price range: $12,000–$25,000 typical; install 4–7 days; 30-year material & labor warranty

## Credentials & Certifications
- Andersen Certified Contractor
- James Hardie Alliance Select
- AAMA Gold Label installer
- Installation Masters
- Lead Safe Certified, EPA Accredited
- Tennessee License #11022

## Warranties (The Patriot's Promise)
- Windows: Lifetime material & labor, fully transferable one time then prorated
- Siding: 30-year material & labor
- Entry doors: 15-year material & labor
- Plus: signed timeline agreements, $2M insurance, owner-led accountability

## Financing
- 0% interest for 6, 12, or 18 months
- 6.99% APR up to 60 months
- 9.99% APR up to 144 months
- Zero down for most approved homeowners

## Business Hours
- Monday–Thursday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Friday–Saturday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Service Areas (Tennessee & Georgia)

### Tennessee
- Chattanooga, TN (Hamilton County)
- Hixson, TN (Hamilton County)
- East Ridge, TN (Hamilton County)
- Red Bank, TN (Hamilton County)
- Soddy-Daisy, TN (Hamilton County)
- Signal Mountain, TN (Hamilton County)
- Ooltewah, TN (Hamilton County)
- Collegedale, TN (Hamilton County)
- Apison, TN (Hamilton County)
- Cleveland, TN (Bradley County)
- McDonald, TN (Bradley County)
- Charleston, TN (Bradley County)
- Athens, TN (McMinn County)

### Georgia
- Dalton, GA (Whitfield County)
- Cohutta, GA (Whitfield County)
- Ringgold, GA (Catoosa County)
- Fort Oglethorpe, GA (Catoosa County)
- Rossville, GA (Walker County)
- Chickamauga, GA (Walker County)
- Lookout Mountain, GA (Walker County)
- Calhoun, GA (Gordon County)
- Cartersville, GA (Bartow County)
- Marietta, GA (Cobb County)
- Kennesaw, GA (Cobb County)
- Roswell, GA (Fulton County)
- Alpharetta, GA (Fulton County)
- Woodstock, GA (Cherokee County)

## Service Process
1. Free in-home estimate — measure openings, walk options, one honest itemized number
2. Signed timeline agreement; permits pulled as part of full service
3. Expert installation by 4th-generation, manufacturer-direct crew
4. Final walk-through and clean site; warranty in hand

## Customer Reviews (4.9★, 110 Google reviews)
- "We can't say enough about the quality of work and product. From energy efficiency that's already noticeable in our first electric bill, to aesthetic beauty and home safety — we are beyond pleased." — AMANDA TURNER
- "I got estimates from four companies. Patriots' Pride was the least expensive by far. The 7400 series windows were built and installed in less than four weeks. Highly recommend, especially for veterans." — BILL SCOTT
- "Hardie board on our entire house. FANTASTIC job at an unbelievably low price. Ashton was onsite every day. Above all — unquestionable integrity. They earn the name Patriot's PRIDE." — WALT CALDWELL
- "True craftsmanship is a rarity. As an engineer, I notice detail — and there wasn't a thing they could pull over my eyes. So refreshing. We'd recommend Patriots to everyone we know." — BOBBIE BURKE
- "Kenny gave us all our options for windows and doorwalls, introduced the crew on install day, and did a walk-through after. A few small issues were addressed right away. 100% recommend." — HOLLY LEVERTON
